pageContext.name: Ahsoka Tano 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are proud to present the limited-edition Mandalorian Poster Coin Collection. Join the way of the Mandalore with New Zealand Mint's third release in the new silver Star Wars™ collectible Coin Series for the hit Lucasfilm series The Mandalorian™!  Hero of the Clone Wards, Ahsoka Tano™ was the padawan learner to Anakin Skywalker™, who grew from a headstrong Jedi™ student into a mature leader. This Sideshow Exclusive one-of-a-kind antiqued 1oz pure silver coin includes a colored image of the stubborn yet brave Togruta™ female in a powerful stance with her distinct dual white lightsabers.   The officially licensed coin features an engraved phrase 'Jedi Ahsoka Tano' sits alongside her signet, and an engraved masthead borders the coin design. The obverse simply shows the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, to confirm it as a legal tender coin.   Only 2,000 will be made, don't miss your chance to own the Ahsoka Tano 1oz Silver Coin.
